contract_summary: Get-wrapper that looks up a pending acquire state (XFRM_STATE_ACQ) by sequence number and, if found, acquires a reference on the xfrm_state via xfrm_state_hold. The caller receives the state with an elevated refcount and is responsible for calling xfrm_state_put when done. If no matching state is found, NULL is returned with no reference taken. The caller must check the return value before dereferencing. The lookup is performed under the appropriate protection (state_byseq hash table).
